game_name: Ogre Battle: The March of the Black Queen

enemy_sprites.name: Generic Zeteginean Forces
enemy_sprites.behavioral_type: unit-based AI following player tactics (Best, Strong, Weak, Leader)

enemy_sprites.name: Vampires
enemy_sprites.behavioral_type: nocturnal; appear in coffins during day, active at evening

enemy_sprites.name: Werewolves
enemy_sprites.behavioral_type: nocturnal; appear as normal men during day, transform at evening

enemy_sprites.name: Dragons/Griffons
enemy_sprites.behavioral_type: oversized units; count as 2 squad slots

descriptors: tactical map with day/night cycle visual shifts
distinctive_elements: Tarot card system integrated into UI
Dynamic unit formations affecting visual appearance
Time-of-day sprite variations (vampires in coffins vs. active; werewolves as humans vs. transformed)
Squad-based unit representation on tactical map

sources_used: Wikipedia - Ogre Battle: The March of the Black Queen
